title: Device(headset) is successfully registered to Cloud
scenario: Headset appears in Poly Lens Cloud inventory after pairing with Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Lens app with no headsets connected.
Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → General → Account.
Check the Lens server inventory page — the device list should show only the Mobile app initially.
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and pair a new headset.
Return to the Poly Lens app and refresh the Lens Cloud inventory page.
Verify the newly paired headset appears on the inventory list.
expected: The newly paired headset appears on the Lens Cloud inventory list alongside the Mobile app.
